generated by AI in Github cloud

# Obligatory AI Generated Comment Compliance

## Rule Source

- `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md`

## Mandatory Rule

For every newly created file and every newly created class, include exactly:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Placement Guidance

- New file: place near the top
- New class: place in or directly above class definition
- Do not alter capitalization, spacing, or wording

## Verification

Before finalizing, scan all newly added files/classes and confirm the exact phrase appears as required.
